parameters.text: 👋 AI Resume Builder I'll generate an ATS-optimized, tailored PDF resume for any job description using Claude AI + LaTeX. How to use: /resume [paste job description here] Or just paste a job description (200+ chars) directly. Example: /resume We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer with 5+ years of Python experience, expertise in Kubernetes, and strong ML infrastructure background... ⏱ Takes ~30 seconds. I'll send the PDF when ready.

📋 Please send the job description after /resume: /resume Senior Backend Engineer at Acme Corp. We are looking for 5+ years Python, Kubernetes expertise, ML background... Or just paste the full JD text directly (no command needed for long text).
⚙️ Generating your resume... This takes ~30 seconds: • Analyzing job description • Optimizing resume with Claude AI • Compiling PDF with LaTeX Stand by!

assignments.name: defaultResume
assignments.value:
Name: Vishal M
Email: vishal.maheshshivashankar@gmail.com
Role: Senior Member Technical Team | Perfios Software Pvt Ltd | 4 Years
Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

SUMMARY:
Senior Software Engineer with 4 years of specialized experience in backend systems, ML infrastructure, and LLM integration. Expert in designing scalable microservices using Python, Celery, and Kubernetes. Proven track record of reducing operational costs by 35% and processing 30K+ daily requests. Passionate about MLOps automation, end-to-end data pipelines, and AI/LLM-powered intelligent document processing.

EDUCATION:
- BE in Computer Science
- PUC in PCME
- SSLC

CERTIFICATIONS:
- AWS Cloud Practitioner

SKILLS:
Languages: Python
Queuing/Messaging: Celery, Redis, Kafka
Cloud: GCP, AWS (ECS, S3, Lambda), Vertex AI
Orchestration: Kubernetes, Docker
Data Engineering: Apache Airflow, Dagster
ML/AI: MLflow, LLM Prompt Engineering, LLM Executor
Search: Elasticsearch, OpenSearch, Logstash, Fluentbit
Frontend: React 18
DevOps: GitLab CI/CD, Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack
Databases: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, DynamoDB, Redis

EXPERIENCE:

Senior Member Technical Team | Perfios Software Pvt Ltd | Apr 2025 - Present
- Led development of enterprise MLOps platform automating end-to-end ML lifecycle, reducing model training time from weeks to days
- Architected LLM Prompt Service supporting multi-backend storage (MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, DynamoDB) with versioning and environment labeling
- Built LLM Executor Service consolidating 15+ ML containers into unified system, reducing infrastructure costs by 60%
- Designed intelligent deduplication system using Elasticsearch achieving 20% reduction in duplicate transaction processing
- Developed Search APIs handling 100K+ daily queries with sub-second response time using advanced indexing strategies
- Established monitoring and observability framework using Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK stack for production ML systems

Software Development Engineer | Perfios Software Pvt Ltd | Aug 2022 - Mar 2025
- Architected ML Executor Service deploying 20+ models on Kubernetes, processing 30,000+ daily requests with 99.9% uptime
- Designed enterprise-scale DataLake using Airflow and Dagster managing 50TB+ structured data for analytics and ML training
- Implemented checksum-based deduplication reducing duplicate processing by 40% and saving significant compute resources
- Built comprehensive metrics tracking system for TAT analysis, ML vs GT comparison, and document quality assessment
- Migrated critical services from AWS ECS to Kubernetes, improving scalability and reducing operational costs by 35%
- Created automated data curation pipelines generating high-quality training datasets for continuous model improvement

SDE Intern | Perfios Software Solutions Pvt Ltd | Feb 2022 - Jun 2022
- Developed and trained ML models in Google Vertex AI for KYC document classification and field extraction
- Built serverless deployment platform using AWS Lambda enabling rapid model deployment with auto-scaling
- Implemented CI/CD pipelines using GitLab for automated testing and deployment of ML models
- Contributed to 3x faster inference time through model quantization and batching

KEY PROJECTS:
1. ML Executor Service: Async ML inference (Celery, Redis, Kafka), 20+ models, 30K+ daily requests, 99.9% uptime, 35% cost reduction
2. DataLake: Enterprise datalake (Airflow, Dagster), 50TB+ data, 40% deduplication reduction
3. Search and Deduplication: 100K+ daily documents, sub-second queries, $50K+ annual cost savings
4. MLOps Platform: End-to-end automation with MLflow, 50+ model versions, weeks-to-days training time
5. LLM Prompt Store: Multi-backend (MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, DynamoDB), React 18 UI, 90% latency reduction
6. LLM Executor Service: Consolidated 15+ containers, 60% infrastructure cost reduction, days-to-hours deployment
7. Translation Service: Google Cloud Translation + Redis caching, 70% API cost reduction

PERSONAL PROJECTS:
- ORBIT Finance Manager: Telegram bot + Gmail API + Gemini AI categorization, 98% transaction accuracy, natural language query interface
